title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Knee Swelling
description: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils contains rosmarinic acid, a powerful antioxidant that helps reduce inflammation. This oil also has anti-inflammatory properties due to the presence of carnosic acid and ursolic acid, which work together to ease swelling. The analgesic properties of Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils, attributed to the presence of borneol and bornyl acetate, help alleviate pain associated with knee swelling.
